title: Pause to Soltor
author: tht1bu.xsh
summary: Development on Soltor has been temporarily placed on hold.
content:
As of March 15th, 2026 at 2:00 PM AEST, development on Soltor has been temporarily placed on hold.

While this was a difficult decision for the team to make, we believe it is the best step forward for both Soltor and Fleaq Entertainment.

This pause will allow us to:
- Improve our planning and organize development more effectively.
- Expand our team with new contributors.
- Strengthen our marketing efforts.

This ensures that when development resumes in the coming months, the project will move forward in a much stronger and more sustainable way.

We truly appreciate everyone's patience, understanding, and continued support during this time.

title: Welcome to Fleaq Ent.
author: Fleaq Team
summary: Our official Blog page is finally live!
content:
Welcome to the official Fleaq Entertainment blog.

We will be using this space to update you on our latest game updates, animations/videos, and art projects.

Stay tuned for more updates!
